messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0162",
  "title": "POINT AWARDS",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## POINT AWARDS

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading "POINT AWARDS" and contains no body text. Consequently, it cannot answer questions regarding specific topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. It serves only as a structural marker indicating the presence of a point awards section, but provides no substantive information or retrievable answers.
